headline: IDEXX (IDXX) Launches Canine Cancer Detection Panel in UK
summary: IDEXX Laboratories Inc. (NASDAQ:IDXX) is one of the 9 Best QQQ Stocks to Buy Now. On April 01, IDEXX Laboratories announced the launch of the IDEXX Cancer Dx Panel in the UK, specifically for the early detection of lymphoma in at-risk dogs. This blood-based test is designed to integrate into both sick-pet diagnostics and routine […]
